about.title: AI Opinion Analysis System
about.subtitle: Monitor, analyze, and predict public sentiment across news and social media
about.feature1Desc: Automatically collects articles from Google News, PTT, and YouTube every 2 hours
about.feature2Desc: Powered by Groq LLM to classify sentiment, detect fake news, and model topics
about.feature3Desc: LINE Bot notifications when sentiment spikes are detected

home.title: AI Topic Analyzer
home.subtitle: Ask about any real-world topic
home.emptyChat: Ask me about any real-world topic to get started

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Keyword frequency & article insights
dashboard.welcome: Welcome! Here's how to get started
dashboard.step1: ① Add keywords to the Keyword Watchlist below — these are what the crawler monitors.
dashboard.step2: ② The crawler runs automatically every 2 hours, or trigger it manually from the backend.
dashboard.step3: ③ Once articles are collected, click ▶ Run Sentiment Batch to analyze them.
dashboard.step4: ④ All dashboard panels will populate automatically after analysis.
dashboard.welcomeNote: This message disappears once your first articles are collected.
dashboard.noAnalyzed: No analyzed articles yet — run batch first
dashboard.noReports: No reports yet — generate one or wait for Monday 8am
dashboard.semanticPlaceholder: Search by meaning, e.g. 半導體供應鏈 or chip shortage impact...
dashboard.semanticEmpty: No results — try a different query or run the embedding pipeline first
dashboard.semanticHint: Enter a query above to search semantically
dashboard.noSimilar: No similar articles found — embed more articles first
dashboard.serverError: ⚠️ Could not reach the server. Make sure the backend is running.

stance.title: Stance Analysis
stance.noData: No stance data yet — click Run to start

heatmap.title: Sentiment Heatmap
heatmap.subtitle: Keyword sentiment intensity — last 12 weeks
heatmap.noDataHint: Add keywords to the watchlist and run the crawler to populate data

watchlist.title: Keyword Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: Keywords the crawler monitors each cycle
watchlist.noKeywords: No keywords yet — add one above or approve suggestions from Groq
watchlist.noSuggestionsHint: Click "🤖 Suggest Keywords" to run Groq analysis
watchlist.suggestDone: ✅ Suggestion run complete — check pending tab

trend.title: Trend Prediction
trend.tokenLimitError: AI analysis unavailable — daily token limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
trend.volumeLabel: Daily article volume — last {days} days ({count} data points)
trend.noArticles: No articles found for this period/keyword
trend.aiUnavailable: AI analysis unavailable — check Groq API
